creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Yes, it's not required; but previously lots of people found it useful to be 
able to run Linux binaries.  Demand was popular enough to warrant it being 
the default. 

If someone does not need it, it can be turned off.  Does it break anything 
for you that you want it to be off by default?  Please provide more rationale 
behind such requests, thank you.
